name: Imaging Dynamics Company Ltd.
summary: Imaging Dynamics Company Ltd., a medical technology company, provides digital radiography equipment worldwide. The company offers imaging detectors; and flat panel detectors under Aquarius8600 and VetnovaXion names. It also provides Magellan, a medical image processing software; and Sirius, a veterinary image processing software. In addition, the company provides 1600 Plus X-Series, a DR solution with a floor mounted U-arm multi-axis positioning device that includes X-ray tube, collimator, and generator; and veterinary DR systems. Further, it provides after sales services. It offers products through dealers, distributors, and original equipment manufacturer partners. The company was formerly known as Imaging Dynamics Corporation and changed its name to Imaging Dynamics Company Ltd. in October 2001. Imaging Dynamics Company Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Vaughan, Canada.
